name: MFA Registration Gap Finder
description: Identifies users lacking compliant MFA registration, filtered by department, role, or risk profile. Ask me about MFA gaps in your organization, SMS-only users, or registration rates by department.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Show me all users in Finance with no MFA registered
How many users are registered only with SMS OTP?
Who are the most senior employees without Authenticator app?
What percentage of our contractor population is MFA-registered?
